description: CompositionBlack floaters with blue detailing, synthetic upper with blue cushioned lining, phylon cushioned footbed, and forefoot, midfoot and back strap for snug FitCare1. Rub surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dust2. Do not machine washSleek and stylish, these black floaters from puma with bright blue detailing make them an ideal casual footwear. The blue cushioned lining for the black uppers adds an exra element of luxury. The durable rubber outsole with aggressive lug detailing enhnaces grip, doubling this into a stylish beachwear.
